Parameter.name: LevelsTc
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets levels test condition to use for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: TimingsTc
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets timing test condition to use for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: Patlist
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets plist to use for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: Pins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets list of pins to use for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: PrePlist
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

Parameter.name: MaskPins
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the pins to mask for functional test execution.

Parameter.name: TotalCaptureCount
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the total amount of failures allowed if using PerCycleFails to generate packets. Ignored otherwise.

Parameter.name: ApplyEndSequence
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets whether to apply the end sequence for this test execution.

Parameter.name: KeyForSharedStorage
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets the key to use when inserting the final binary string into shared storage.

Parameter.name: Sequence
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets a sequence of integer values that will be used to sequence packets in 'Wave'. These values will be checked against the sequence value of each packet.

Parameter.name: DataBits
Parameter.descriptions: Indexes of bits of packet data used marked as data for output.

Parameter.name: IdBits
Parameter.descriptions: Indexes of packet data used to determine the sequence of packet data.

Parameter.name: ValidBits
Parameter.descriptions: Indexes of packet data used to determine the validity of packet data.

Parameter.name: ValidValues
Parameter.descriptions: The binary values the valid bits should display to consider the packet data as valid.

Parameter.name: InvalidPacketTolerance
Parameter.descriptions: The maximum allowed invalid cycles when assembling packets. By default, any invalid packets will cause the test method to exit port 2.

Parameter.name: Timeout
Parameter.descriptions: The maximum allowed time to innerExecute this instance before exiting out port 0.

Parameter.name: PacketSize
Parameter.descriptions: The expected size of complete packets.

Parameter.name: AlignmentLabel
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets a string that matches to the alignment label contained in functional test content. Label is used to indicate first vector strobing for packet data.

Parameter.name: LabelOffset
Parameter.descriptions: Gets or sets an integer indicating the offset the alignment label (or from the first vector) where pattern begins strobing for packet data.

Parameter.name: ReversePacketOutput
Parameter.descriptions: If true, reverses the bits of the output packets before placing them into SharedStorage

ExitPort.PortDescriptions: Functional test had no fails, functional test failed on unexpected pin, or no complete packets were generated from fails.
Fails for functional test were processed successfully and inserted into shared storage.
Test method execution time exceeded Timeout parameter, the number of invalid packets exceeded the InvalidPacketTolerance parameter, or wave algorithm reached an invalid state.
PORT FAIL FOR SW ERROR CONDITION
PORT FAIL FOR HW ALARM CONDITION
